{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032016520141EAF15B20B26343C0A3\"}"},"total":5287},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7055566451591430919","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"此书霸气凌然，浑然天成。每每读到新的一章，让人感觉回味无穷，是有金戈铁马之意。纵横疆场，人生几度，完美诠释了什么叫做血染沙场，死不休战。千余年前，有大秦，风起，千余年后，有北凉，死战❗"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1642752081,"group_id":"7032135922250419207","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"人生不幸遇至事，笑谈春风几多时","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8zNnfIe7z5ti7W5ci5SfnIngxQJDSeouqXil/ayU9Cw","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/75d34f6a0fff466a808495d48727a0bf~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776534358\u0026x-signature=rZykd2wfkA1Z%2FOBrWY2hi1ojJtU%3D","user_id":"2357774739324782","user_name":"炸天帮  道长"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2357774739324782","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7032135922250419207","book_info":{"abstract":"“近卫军团何在，可敢随我驰骋漠北疆场，马踏燕戎王帐。”一个身披红袍的将军立马横刀，“愿往！”身前的百战之卒异口同声的应答。一个由小山村走出来的少年，从军只为给家里省点赋税，只想攒钱娶青梅竹马为妻，随着军功不断，一步步升官，大权在握之时却山河破碎，城破国亡。他登高一呼，起兵抗敌，他要建立一个属于自己的王朝！他要给自己心爱的女人一个天下！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d4212540d327860193c2e4734cd1f43c","author":"风尘落雨","author_id":"","book_id":"7032135922250419207","book_name":"从军行","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0e8c8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":273,\"name\":\"历史古代\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273\u0026name=历史古代\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":12,\"name\":\"历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12\u0026name=历史\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7032309040302522910","read_count":"49633","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"5611275"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"2692","tags":"历史古代,历史","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/e166a0ef6cf47257200bf25ff3419531~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779180721\u0026x-signature=4MbpsoZiP9mA42iXKaRCKOh078Y%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4.4179496e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032016520141EAF15B20B26343C0A3\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读12小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":81,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":44179,"reply_count":4,"show_pv":125889},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7165502410457269028","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"架空的历史文很有意思，首先主角不是创越，重生，金手指啥的，就是一个土生土长的一个人，从一个士兵一点一点成长的故事，对于军事刻画的很细致，作为军事迷的男人来说看的挺过瘾，比较合理，没有说主角的人就不死，没有牺牲什么的，基本靠着多少次战争磨练出来的精锐，没有战争的磨砺，就成为精锐那是纯纯的爽文"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1668348629,"group_id":"7032135922250419207","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8tLo/6tPyCbtp2EtfIbC7w=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776528048\u0026x-signature=lJXJWxMJlPQ4kLKophYWoYhmpaE%3D","user_id":"87319059679","user_name":"百里山丘"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"87319059679","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1704245155,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7032135922250419207","book_info":{"abstract":"“近卫军团何在，可敢随我驰骋漠北疆场，马踏燕戎王帐。”一个身披红袍的将军立马横刀，“愿往！”身前的百战之卒异口同声的应答。一个由小山村走出来的少年，从军只为给家里省点赋税，只想攒钱娶青梅竹马为妻，随着军功不断，一步步升官，大权在握之时却山河破碎，城破国亡。他登高一呼，起兵抗敌，他要建立一个属于自己的王朝！他要给自己心爱的女人一个天下！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d4212540d327860193c2e4734cd1f43c","author":"风尘落雨","author_id":"","book_id":"7032135922250419207","book_name":"从军行","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0e8c8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":273,\"name\":\"历史古代\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273\u0026name=历史古代\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":12,\"name\":\"历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12\u0026name=历史\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7032309040302522910","read_count":"49633","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"5611275"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"2692","tags":"历史古代,历史","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/e166a0ef6cf47257200bf25ff3419531~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779180721\u0026x-signature=4MbpsoZiP9mA42iXKaRCKOh078Y%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.6892026e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032016520141EAF15B20B26343C0A3\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读29小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":27,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":66796,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":103687,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":37024},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7179648008081539895","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"本书着重渲染了边关烽火情，展现了一个有理想和抱负的边关将军形象，在一次次的防边战役中，尘岳在从一届平民成长起来，成为一方大将，为人民平静的生活在不屈的挣扎，这本书给我特别强的代入感，我在书中看到了智谋和决断力，以及一次一次的化险为夷的快感，都给这本书带来了不一样的色彩，使得人物更加活灵活现，更具有性格色彩，使得情节更加引人入胜，特别喜欢作者的这一篇小说，令我感受到了不一样的边关生活，令我想到了宋太祖赵匡胤，和尘岳性格特点相似，使得小说更具有历史深度，让这本书有很强的特色，这本书是一本鹤立鸡群的边疆战争小说！\n（希望作者再接再厉，继续写出更好的故事情节！）","text_exts":[{"e":204,"s":201,"text":"赵匡胤","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E8%B5%B5%E5%8C%A1%E8%83%A4\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317739967216343C0A3%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227179648008081539895%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227032135922250419207%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%B5%B5%E5%8C%A1%E8%83%A4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1671642528,"group_id":"7032135922250419207","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个游离在人间的有趣灵魂","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5tfujPNHu3WX5GdeubvdWE=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"937241137913758","user_name":"洒脱疯子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"937241137913758","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家\",\"title_id\":\"author\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#FFB95C\\\"}\",\"bg_dark_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#CC8029\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#CC9349\\\"}\",\"title_dark_diaphaneity\":\"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7032135922250419207","book_info":{"abstract":"“近卫军团何在，可敢随我驰骋漠北疆场，马踏燕戎王帐。”一个身披红袍的将军立马横刀，“愿往！”身前的百战之卒异口同声的应答。一个由小山村走出来的少年，从军只为给家里省点赋税，只想攒钱娶青梅竹马为妻，随着军功不断，一步步升官，大权在握之时却山河破碎，城破国亡。他登高一呼，起兵抗敌，他要建立一个属于自己的王朝！他要给自己心爱的女人一个天下！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d4212540d327860193c2e4734cd1f43c","author":"风尘落雨","author_id":"","book_id":"7032135922250419207","book_name":"从军行","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0e8c8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":273,\"name\":\"历史古代\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273\u0026name=历史古代\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":12,\"name\":\"历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12\u0026name=历史\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7032309040302522910","read_count":"49633","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"5611275"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"2692","tags":"历史古代,历史","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/e166a0ef6cf47257200bf25ff3419531~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779180721\u0026x-signature=4MbpsoZiP9mA42iXKaRCKOh078Y%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4.2240869e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032016520141EAF15B20B26343C0A3\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读12小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":18,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":42240,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":37223},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"","audio_thumb_uri":"","author":"","author_id":"","book_id":"7032135922250419207","book_name":"","book_type":"","color_domi
